ShortDescription.Value: Auto-Clean garbage OR be the Trash Boss = Self manage garbage trucks + buildings

Publish.LongDescription:
**Magic Garbage + Trash Boss**
Handle garbage your way: - **Total Magic** option cleans all city garbage. - **Trash Boss** option lets you tune all garbage trucks and facilities.
---
### How it works
**OPTION 1 AUTO CLEAN** - ✅ Total Magic On, removes all garbage. - Perfect if you want to forget about all garbage. - Set it and forget it! (most like classic old "magical garbage") - No garbage issues; trucks and facilities become mostly cosmetic. - Mod does not stop Garbage system, it's just very fast cleanup.
**OPTION 2 SELF MANAGE** - ✅ Trash Boss On; manage how you like. - **Sliders** to control all garbage trucks + facilities - 🚚 Enhance trucks to reduce traffic and service strain. - Great if you still want to see trucks driving around, just fewer problems. - **Helper buttons** - [Game Defaults] reset all sliders to 100% (pure vanilla). - [Recommended] presets for % load, truck count, process speed, storage max.
**OPTION 3 NO MAGIC** (vanilla) - Turn Trash Boss on ✅, Click [Game Defaults] - All sliders at 100% = exactly standard gameplay.
### 11 languages - English, Français French, Deutsch German, Español Spanish, Italiano Italian - 日本語 Japanese, 한국어 Korean - 简体中文 Simplified Chinese, 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese - Português Brasil, Polski Polish
---
### Compatibility - Works with new and existing cities. Enable/Disable any time, safely remove any time. - Does not use Harmony or Reflection; lightweight, compatible, and less likely to break with game updates.
---
### Credits - RiverMochi - author - Thanks to Wayz for inspiration on the original Magical Garbage mod - yenyang - code review, tech advice - Necko1996 - testing and screenshots - gagaxm - thumbnail image
Publish.ChangeLog: * renamed semi-magic to Trash Boss. * added Status Report section with garbage related data. * Updated translations and docs.
